title: Challenges
description: Quests for the Challenges progression path.

quests.title: Where did the pandas go?
description: Get some bamboo from a bamboo forest biome

quests.title: Flying magic!
description: Obtain a magic feather which allows flight near a beacon

quests.title: Sand but Better
description: Obtain a snad which accelerates growth of cactus and sugarcane on it

quests.title: Building Helper
description: Obtain a chisel which changes the style of your blocks

quests.title: Draconic Soul
description: Obtain a Draconic Soul by defeating the Ender Dragon at highest difficulty

quests.title: The Destroyer
description: Defeat The Destroyer in the defiled lands to get Ravaging Essence

quests.title: Dancing on Fire
description: Obtain Lava Waders which allows you to walk on lava!

quests.title: Cosmos in Your Hand
description: Obtain Cosmilite Ingot by fusing many of the strongest metals

quests.title: One-stop Agricultural Market
description: Obtain a market which allows you to buy saplings and seeds

quests.title: Blood Deal
description: Craft these items to help you control the blood moon!

quests.title: Tofu Power
description: Defeat the Tofu Gandlem to get a TofuForce Core

quests.title: A Peaceful Life
description: Marry a villager and birth a child

quests.title: I'm in Charge of This Game
Underground Treasure
description: Find a treasure urn. Beware of snakes!

quests.title: 1Up
description: Get a Heart Container, crafted by heart crystal shards which can be occasionally found in dungeons or dropped from mobs.

quests.title: Tofu World
description: Enter Tofu World by clicking a frame made with grilled tofu blocks and clicking it with a tofu staff.
This isn't true, instead you need to make magic soybean paste, just to say you did it!

quests.title: Ancient Tome
description: Get an ancient tome by killing mobs at high difficulty

quests.title: City Protectors
description: Obtain the required item(s), Click for more info

quests.title: Nasty Magnets
description: Craft a demagnetizer which disables item that increases pickup range in a radius

quests.title: I'm Ready For This
description: Obtain a water candle which significantly boosts mob spawn rate nearby

quests.title: A small tree
description: Obtain a Bonsai Pot which helps planting trees!

quests.title: Shooting Stars
description: Pick up a fallen star, they sometimes fall from the sky at night

quests.title: Mom's Lunchbox
description: Craft a lunch box which makes carrying and consuming food more easy

quests.title: You Can't Eat This
description: Craft a Magic Mushroom, which increases the mining level of a tool when applied as modifier

quests.title: No More Experience Losses
description: Craft a XP Block to deposit your XP

quests.title: Quest Display
description: Craft a Task Screen which can be used to submit RF, mana, etc

quests.title: Quick, make a wish... oh wait... oh no!
description: Get a meteor ingot from one of the meteors that fall from the sky

quests.title: Foodie's Heaven
description: Enter Candy World by eating a magic piece of candy (there is no candy world, you just ate  some sketchy candy and now you are a pretty pretty princess...)

quests.title: Daydreamer
description: Build a hammock by connecting it to 2 opposite Rope and Nails that are 4 blocks apart. Hammocks can make you sleep at day!
Black hammocks are the most comfy.

quests.title: Music!
description: Craft a Soundnizer to play the music you like!

quests.title: Fast Farming
description: Craft a Growth Accelerator that accelerates crop growth when placed beneath the farmland. Placing multiple stacks the effect.

quests.title: Infernal Metal
description: Defeat Barako, the Sun Chief, and get Infernium in the Nether

quests.title: Condensed Essence
description: Not quite flux dust... but close!

quests.title: Bounty Hunter
description: Find a bounty board in the village, you can pick up bounty quests on it or take it to your base!

quests.title: Soul of Withering
description: Obtain a Soul of Withering by defeating the Wither at highest difficulty

quests.title: Expensive Food
description: White chocolate on toast! It's not a nether star, but it's close enough!

quests.title: Bane of Evil
description: Obtain a Mega Torch which prevents mobs from spawning within a large area

quests.title: Tower Conquerer
description: Reach the last floor of a battle tower and kill the boss there
